{{Quote|Tell me Oro, how did you like Tol Ado?|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="JH" />}}
'''Oro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who lived during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{RPG}}
Oro was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who worked as an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], the leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and he was also secretly employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Oro spent some time with the Imperial [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sebastian Parnell]] on [[Tol Ado]], an Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], and the Mon Calamari revealed to the Empire some information that compromised an Alliance operation in the [[Sil'Lume system/Legends|Sil'Lume system]]. Afterward, Oro departed from Tol Ado aboard a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and, unknown to the Mon Calamari, he was observed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], a member of the Alliance who had stowed away aboard the ship. Oro eventually made it to [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and after Skywalker arrived at the base, General [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] summoned Skywalker to a meeting with Mon Mothma and Oro, to discuss the recently compromised Alliance operation. Skywalker immediately recognized Oro and deduced that the Mon Calamari had compromised the operation in the Sil'Lume system, so Skywalker ignited his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and held it to Oro's throat.
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Oro was created by [[Troy Denning]] and appeared in a [[Roleplaying game|role-playing]] strand in the [[1990]] [[West End Games]] role-playing supplement ''[[Jedi's Honor]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi's Honor]]'' {{1st}}
